triage.label: Triage
triage.hint: Primary survey — ABCDE, IV access, monitor.

resus.label: Resus bay
resus.hint: Active resuscitation. Drag dot-phrases onto the patient.

lab.label: Lab / blood draw
lab.hint: Cultures and labs before antibiotics when possible.

meds.label: Bedside meds
meds.hint: IV access, antibiotics, procedures at the bedside.

icu.label: ICU
icu.hint: Critical care — shock, vent, vasopressors, close monitoring.

ward.label: Inpatient ward
ward.hint: Stable enough for floor — telemetry or routine nursing.

obs.label: Observation
obs.hint: Short-stay unit — rule out, serial exams, repeat labs.

transfer.label: Transfer out
transfer.hint: Higher level of care elsewhere — STEMI center, trauma, pediatrics.
